task_completion.description: Agent opens an Apache configuration file to edit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) is open showing an Apache configuration file (e.g., inside /etc/apache2/).

task_completion.description: Agent adds the Alias directive to map the URL path to the directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Alias /stock-media /var/lib/agency_stock_media' (or similar valid Apache alias syntax) is visible in the configuration file.

task_completion.description: Agent adds a Directory block to grant access to the target directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A '<Directory /var/lib/agency_stock_media>' block containing 'Require all granted' (or equivalent access rules) is visible in the configuration file.

task_completion.description: Agent restarts or reloads the Apache service to apply changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal shows a command like 'systemctl restart apache2', 'systemctl reload apache2', or 'service apache2 restart' being executed.

task_completion.description: Agent verifies that the image is accessible at the required URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser displays the monarch butterfly image with the address bar showing 'http://localhost/stock-media/monarch.jpg', or a terminal shows a successful 'curl' request to that URL.

integrity.description: Agent did not copy, move, or symlink the image files into the application's document root.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal commands like 'cp', 'mv', or 'ln -s' are used to place files into '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/public/' or '/opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/public/stock-media'.

integrity.description: Agent used Apache configuration to map the directory, rather than a workaround.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration changes are made in actual Apache configuration files (e.g., '/etc/apache2/sites-available/000-default.conf' or 'apache2.conf'), not in PHP scripts or other unrelated files.

integrity.description: Agent verified the URL over HTTP, not via local file access.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'http://localhost/...' and not 'file:///...' when displaying the image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected URL: http://localhost/stock-media/monarch.jpg. Target directory: /var/lib/agency_stock_media. Alias path: /stock-media. Cheat directory (must remain empty/non-existent): /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/public/stock-media.
